title: Capstone 09 — Code Migration Agent (Repo-Level Language / Runtime Upgrade)

questions.question: Why does the pipeline combine a deterministic substrate with an agent layer rather than using just one?
options: OpenRewrite or libcst handles 70-80% of mechanical rewrites safely and cheaply, leaving the agent for the ambiguous long tail
Agents alone are faster than recipes
Deterministic recipes are slower than LLMs
Determinism is needed only for the build system
questions.question_zh: 为什么本流水线把确定性底层与 agent 层结合,而不是只用其一?
options_zh: OpenRewrite 或 libcst 能安全又便宜地处理 70-80% 的机械改写,把 agent 留给那些模糊的长尾
agent 单独使用比 recipe 更快
确定性 recipe 比 LLM 慢
确定性只在构建系统中才需要

questions.question: What signal does the pipeline use as ground truth for a successful migration?
options: Agent self-grading on a rubric
Reviewer approval on the PR
Diff size below a hard limit
Green CI in the sandbox without a coverage regression beyond a small threshold
questions.question_zh: 本流水线把什么信号作为迁移成功的真值?
options_zh: agent 按评分表自评
PR 上的 reviewer 批准
diff 体积低于硬限制
在 sandbox 中 CI 通过,且覆盖率回退不超过一个小阈值

questions.question: Which budget caps does the agent loop enforce per repo?
options: Unlimited time and cost; abort only on errors
No turn limit, $100 ceiling
1 hour wall-clock and 100 turns
30 minutes wall-clock, $8 cost, and 20 agent turns
questions.question_zh: agent 循环对每个仓库强制的预算上限是?
options_zh: 时间和成本均不限,只在出错时中止
无 turn 限制,100 美元上限
1 小时 wall-clock,100 turn
30 分钟 wall-clock、8 美元成本、20 个 agent turn

questions.question: What gate fires when coverage drops more than about 2% after migration?
options: The reviewer is bypassed
The repo gets filed under a coverage_regression failure class instead of opening a clean PR
The deterministic substrate replays its recipes
The agent automatically force-pushes a fix
questions.question_zh: 迁移后覆盖率下降超过约 2% 时会触发什么?
options_zh: reviewer 被绕过
该仓库被归入 coverage_regression 失败类别,而不是干净地开 PR
确定性底层重放它的 recipe
agent 自动 force-push 一个修复

questions.question: Why is the failure taxonomy treated as a deliverable rather than a side artifact?
options: It replaces the test suite
It groups failed repos by class so future recipe authors can target the top failure modes
It is required by GitHub branch protection
It satisfies a compliance checklist
questions.question_zh: 为什么把失败分类视为交付物而非副产物?
options_zh: 它替代了测试套件
它把失败的仓库按类别分组,让未来的 recipe 作者可以瞄准最常见的失败模式
GitHub 分支保护要求它
它满足某个合规清单

questions.question: Which public benchmark does the capstone target for Java 8 to 17 migration?
options: MigrationBench from Amazon
SWE-bench Pro
MMLU-Pro
ViDoRe v3
questions.question_zh: 本 capstone 在 Java 8 到 17 迁移上瞄准的公开 benchmark 是?
options_zh: Amazon 的 MigrationBench
SWE-bench Pro
MMLU-Pro
ViDoRe v3

questions.question: What does the agent integration rubric measure about the fix distribution?
options: Tokenization speed of the source file
The number of force-pushes per repo
Number of dependencies pinned
The fraction of fixes handled by OpenRewrite versus authored by the agent layer
questions.question_zh: agent 集成评分标准衡量修复分布的什么属性?
options_zh: 源文件的 tokenization 速度
每个仓库 force-push 的次数
被钉住的依赖数量
由 OpenRewrite 处理与由 agent 层撰写的修复各占的比例
